channel.title: JLT Supplier Spotlight (LinkedIn)
channel.description: Weekly Supplier Spotlight from JLT Group — LinkedIn Business edition

item.title: Royal Caribbean International has brought Legend of the Seas into service: the third Icon-class ship, and the first of the class to sail in Europe.
item.description:
Royal Caribbean International has brought Legend of the Seas into service: the third Icon-class ship, and the first of the class to sail in Europe.
For agents, the appeal is breadth. One booking covers several completely different holidays, which suits multigenerational family groups and first-time cruisers in particular.
Key facts:
Coverage: Western Mediterranean from Barcelona and Rome now; Caribbean via Fort Lauderdale from autumn; Europe again in summer 2027. Scale: 5,610 guests at double occupancy, 28 restaurants, eight neighbourhoods. Trade support: Club Royal portal, Royal Genie digital brochures, Upper Deck rewards.
Less suited to clients seeking a small-ship or classic-liner experience.
Full spotlight on the JLT Agent Hub.
